'''jalate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:irascibly|irascibly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-l-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:irascibly|irascibly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| jalate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:jalate|jalate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:jalatesher|jalatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jalatesherĂ«m|jalatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jalatero|jalatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jalateshĂ«|jalateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jalateshĂ«m|jalateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijalatero|gokijalatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijalateshĂ«|gokijalateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijalateshĂ«m|gokijalateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gojalankerom|gojalankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojalankeshĂ«|gojalankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojalankeshĂ«m|gojalankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gojalankeya|gojalankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jalaterom|jalaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jalatemu|jalatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:jalateya|jalateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijalaterom|gokijalaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijalatemu|gokijalatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokijalateya|gokijalateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:jalalate|jalalate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:jalalatesher|jalalatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jalalatesherĂ«m|jalalatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jalalatero|jalalatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jalalateshĂ«|jalalateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jalalateshĂ«m|jalalateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijalalatero|gokijalalatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijalalateshĂ«|gokijalalateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijalalateshĂ«m|gokijalalateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gojalalankerom|gojalalankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojalalankeshĂ«|gojalalankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojalalankeshĂ«m|gojalalankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gojalalankeya|gojalalankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jalalaterom|jalalaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jalalatemu|jalalatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:jalalateya|jalalateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijalalaterom|gokijalalaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijalalatemu|gokijalalatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokijalalateya|gokijalalateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:jĂŠlĂŠte|jĂŠlĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:jĂŠlĂŠtesher|jĂŠlĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jĂŠlĂŠtesherĂ«m|jĂŠlĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jĂŠlĂŠtero|jĂŠlĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«|jĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«m|jĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijĂŠlĂŠtero|gokijĂŠlĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«|gokijĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«m|gokijĂŠlĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gojĂŠlĂŠnkerom|gojĂŠlĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojĂŠlĂŠnkeshĂ«|gojĂŠlĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojĂŠlĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gojĂŠlĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-

|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jĂŠlĂŠterom|jĂŠlĂŠterom]]
|-

|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:jĂŠlĂŠteya|jĂŠlĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijĂŠlĂŠterom|gokijĂŠlĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijĂŠlĂŠtemu|gokijĂŠlĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokijĂŠlĂŠteya|gokijĂŠlĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:jaflafte|jaflafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:jaflaftesher|jaflaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jaflaftesherĂ«m|jaflaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jaflaftero|jaflaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jaflafteshĂ«|jaflafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jaflafteshĂ«m|jaflafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijaflaftero|gokijaflaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijaflafteshĂ«|gokijaflafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijaflafteshĂ«m|gokijaflafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gojaflafnkerom|gojaflafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojaflafnkeshĂ«|gojaflafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojaflafnkeshĂ«m|gojaflafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gojaflafnkeya|gojaflafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jaflafterom|jaflafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jaflaftemu|jaflaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:jaflafteya|jaflafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijaflafterom|gokijaflafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijaflaftemu|gokijaflaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokijaflafteya|gokijaflafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
